description: Create MCP server for Google Slides, register it in the backend, update orchestrator to know about integration status, and remove direct API approach
steps: 1. CREATE MCP SERVER: Create /projects/sandbox/Haven/mcp-servers/google-slides/server.py following the exact pattern of mcp-servers/google-gmail/server.py. The server should provide these tools: (a) generate_outline - takes auth_token, task_title, task_notes (optional), task_subtasks (optional) and returns an outline JSON with title and slides array. Uses Vertex AI Gemini to generate the outline. (b) create_presentation - takes auth_token and outline (title + slides with bullets) and creates a Google Slides presentation using the Slides API, returns the presentation URL. Port the logic from backend/app/api/slides.py into MCP tool format. The server name should be 'google-slides'.
2. ADD CONFIG: In backend/app/config.py, add MCP_SLIDES_PATH setting with default '../mcp-servers/google-slides/server.py' following the pattern of MCP_GMAIL_PATH.

3. REGISTER IN MAIN.PY: In backend/app/main.py lifespan function, add code to connect the google-slides MCP server following the pattern of the other servers. Resolve the path, connect the server with mcp_client.connect_server(name='google-slides', command=python_cmd, args=[slides_path]).

4. UPDATE SLIDES API: Replace the direct Google API calls in backend/app/api/slides.py with calls through the MCP client (mcp_client.call_tool('google-slides', 'generate_outline', {...}) and mcp_client.call_tool('google-slides', 'create_presentation', {...})). Keep the same REST API contract for the frontend.

5. UPDATE ORCHESTRATOR INTEGRATION AWARENESS: In backend/app/utils/user_context.py, the _safe_integrations_context function needs to also check the explicitly_disconnected flag. Currently it only checks connected_services.get(service_id, {}).get('connected', False). Fix: also check connected_services.get(service_id, {}).get('explicitly_disconnected', False) and if explicitly_disconnected is True, report as NOT connected regardless of the connected flag. This ensures the orchestrator correctly tells agents which services are available.

6. UPDATE ORCHESTRATOR SYSTEM PROMPT: In backend/app/agents/orchestrator.py, add a new agent to the SYSTEM_PROMPT's available agents list: 'slides: Creates Google Slides presentations from task context, generates outlines'. Add routing rules for slides-related requests. Add a route to the slides agent for mentions of 'presentation', 'slides', 'deck', 'powerpoint'. This requires creating a minimal SlidesAgent class or routing to the existing slides API via the planner.
7. ENSURE SLIDES SERVICE IN INTEGRATIONS: Verify that backend/app/api/integrations.py SERVICE_SCOPES already includes 'slides' (it does). No change needed here.
acceptance_criteria: mcp-servers/google-slides/server.py exists and follows the MCP server pattern
Backend main.py registers the google-slides MCP server in lifespan
backend/app/api/slides.py routes through MCP client instead of direct Google API
user_context.py correctly reports disconnected services by checking explicitly_disconnected
python3 -m py_compile succeeds on all modified backend files
